---
name: Feature request / feedback
about: Suggest an improvement, or share how sci-adk did (or didn't) fit your work
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do?**
The research/workflow problem, not just a proposed solution.

**How does sci-adk fall short today?**

**What would help**
A concrete change, or just "here's how I'd want to use it."

**Does the record/belief separation fit your case?**
(Optional, but the kind of feedback that helps most: where does the
record-vs-belief / `verify` model help or get in the way?)
